heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Valley highs in the upper 20s to lower 30s, with some mid 20s far north, and some mid 30s in southeastern valleys and in the Hudson Valley. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming southwest.

heading: Tonight
text: Increasing clouds. Lows from the mid teens to lower 20s, some mid 20s in the broad valleys west. Winds becoming light and variable east of the Greens, and becoming south to southeast 5 to 15 mph from the Green Mountains westward.

heading: Thursday
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Chance of snow or rain showers in the St. Lawrence Valley, mainly in the afternoon. Highs from the mid 30s to lower 40s north, and low to mid 40s in the south. Winds becoming south to southeast 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain Valley.
